title: GitHub Actions Execution Model, Contexts, and State Boundaries · Delivery-System Trace: Ci Run Identity Attempt Evidence
summary: A team confuses workflow, run, job, step, action, runner, shell, workspace, environment file, output, artifact, and cache state while debugging a missing build result. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ci run identity attempt evidence increment in workflow execution and state trace. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use repository, workflow ref, workflow SHA, run ID, run attempt, actor, triggering actor, event, ref, and SHA to identify exact execution evidence.
Compare JavaScript, Docker container, composite, and reusable workflow components by runtime, inputs, isolation, portability, and trust.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# cicd-github-actions cumulative delivery-system portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic workflow, policy, artifact, and release evidence review only.
# They never call GitHub APIs, start runners, execute learner commands, access Docker or registries, exchange OIDC tokens, or contact cloud services.

content.title: Worked case pattern

content.code:
# Worked focus: ci-run-identity-attempt-evidence — Use repository, workflow ref, workflow SHA, run ID, run attempt, actor, triggering actor, event, ref, and SHA to identify exact execution evidence.
  # Evidence: ci-worked-gha-execution-model-contexts-2
  - competency: ci-worked-gha-execution-model-contexts-2
    artifact: execution-trace.yaml
    decision: worked gha execution model contexts 2
    environment: trusted release tag requiring an environment approval
    fault-injection: route five percent traffic to a revision with a data incompatibility
    retained-proof: accessible redacted timeline with owner expiry and regression control
    case-key: worked2
    change: |
      event: pull_request
      workflow-ref: owner/repo/.github/workflows/ci.yml@refs/pull/42/merge
      run-id: 8842
      run-attempt: 2
      job-runner: fresh-ubuntu-24.04
      step-process: isolated-shell
      state-handoff: validated-job-output
      retained-artifact: test-report-digest
    verify: compare event payload workflow ref workflow sha run id attempt runner and artifact metadata
    failure: Reject shared-runner assumptions, branch-only identity, or cache and artifact state treated as equivalent.
    repair: Trace server and runner evaluation, name each state lifetime, and retain exact run and artifact identity.
content.caption: Runnable CI/CD workflow, artifact, release, and transfer-evidence contract example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.
